hero.tagline: Product designer crafting considered interfaces for teams <accent>who care</accent> about the experience.

about.heading: About
about.bio: I'm a product designer with 15 years of experience crafting interfaces for teams who care about the details. I've worked on B2B and B2C projects — e-commerce, admin SaaS, mobile apps — always balancing business vision, user experience and technical feasibility.
